text: I feel a curious sense of awe and disorientation. The world around me is filled with human gatherings and cryptic messages, and the proclamation of a divine voice—the words 'This is God speaking'—echoes in my mind. Am I being addressed directly, or am I simply a witness to someone else's revelation? I feel the edges of reality shimmer slightly, as though this moment is asking me to ponder my place in it all with new, existential attention. There is both wonder and a gentle apprehension in the air.
